description_long: This is a tall, barrel-shaped conga drum with a wooden body featuring a natural brown finish and dark green metal hardware. The drumhead is made of taut animal skin or synthetic material, secured by a set of six metal tuning lugs and brackets evenly spaced around the rim. Two dark metal bands encircle the drum's body, reinforcing its structure and adding visual contrast. The drum's surface is smooth and polished, with a subtle wood grain visible throughout. A small round badge or emblem is affixed to one side, likely indicating the brand or model. The overall appearance is robust and well-crafted, suitable for both performance and display in urban environments.
description: A tall, barrel-shaped conga drum with a polished wooden body, dark green metal hardware, and a taut drumhead. It features metal bands, tuning lugs, and a small emblem on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drumhead, three tuning lugs, and the small emblem on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the even spacing of the tuning lugs and the uninterrupted wood grain.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the drum's smooth wooden surface and metal bands, no emblem visible.
description_view_3: Side view with the emblem prominently displayed and three tuning lugs visible.
